title: Data Compression: Source Coding Theory
description: Master the theory of lossless data compression, including Huffman coding, arithmetic coding, and the fundamental limits set by Shannon's source coding theorem.
learningObjectives: State and prove Shannon's source coding theorem
Implement Huffman coding and analyze its optimality
Understand arithmetic coding and its advantages
Calculate compression rates and compare to entropy bounds
Analyze typical sequences and the asymptotic equipartition property
Connect source coding to quantum data compression
